Content notice: ages 15 and older This interactive novel may include fantasy violence, danger, grief, conflict, discrimination, and age-appropriate romantic themes. It is not intended for children under 15.
Characters and peer interactions will be written around a similar age and stage of life.
Story setting

Relationships develop naturally through choices, time, compatibility, consent, and shared experiences. Romance is never required and remains non-explicit and age-appropriate.
